answer: Nucleon BI Studio offers comprehensive data analytics and reporting for PostgreSQL. dbForge Studio provides powerful GUI tools for data summarization. myDBA.dev specializes in monitoring PostgreSQL extensions.

results.title: PostgreSQL: Software Catalogue - Reporting tools
results.snippet: Nucleon BI Studio is the only BI product to deliver a full range of business intelligence capabilities like: DataSets, Reports, Dashboards, Charts, Cross Tables, Power Views, Statistics, R-Statistics, SQL Query, MongoDB Query, Arango AQL, Couchbase N1QL , C# Scripting, Data Searches, Data Analysis as well as Data Integration, on a single proven architecture. Key features:   * Simple report builder (dropdown menu interface) * Scheduled reports via email (automatic updates of reports you've built) * Collaboration (invite team members or clients with different levels of permission) * Data visualization (tonnes of options, re-visualize data in seconds) * Secure (QueryTree only requires read-only access) | Commercial | Free 14-day trial and then multiple plans starting at $29 per month | D4 Software Ltd | View |.
